overview: A professional and elegant company intranet portal featuring a sidebar navigation, header bar with search and notifications, dashboard with announcements and quick links, employee directory, and announcements page — all with dark mode and responsive layout.
features: Sidebar navigation with collapsible state and company logo
Top header bar with search, notifications, and user avatar dropdown
Dashboard with announcement banner, quick-links grid, and company news feed
Employee directory with search, department filter, and profile cards
Announcements page with full detail view
Dark mode toggle with persistent preference
